title: Pokemon Detail Lookup, Derived Views, Units, and Provenance · Mastery Check
summary: A release reviewer compares near-miss Go decisions for pokemon detail lookup, derived views, units, and provenance and accepts only runnable changed-case evidence, explicit non-claims, and named browser, compiler, race, network, filesystem, terminal, load, accessibility, and production transfer gates. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for human-readable validated Pokemon detail view. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, caus…
objectives: Accept numeric ID or constrained canonical name, retain requested and resolved identity, and reject ambiguous or hostile input.
Model stable identity, species, types, abilities, stats, dimensions, and optional fields separately from the transport DTO.
Convert height and weight only under documented API units, label original and displayed units, and test rounding boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.instruction:
Write the quiz evidence note for Pokedex Go Detail Provenance Tests: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A quiz Go team handles case 8250 during a fair-use API stewardship review. Build deterministic Go evidence to validate Pokemon detail fields, unit conversions, ordered presentation, and provenance; failed and canceled commands must preserve the prior admitted state; then change one catch, owned record, encounter relation, or history state and prove the prior invariant. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original fixtures only. Real PokéAPI traffic, DNS, sockets, TLS, host files, terminals, signals, race and leak claims, load, cross-platform packaging, accessibility review, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Verify request identity, response identity, source URL, cache state, unit conversion, sorting, missing fields, and changed fixtures.

Evidence target: Pokedex product engineering and Go Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Pokedex Go Detail Provenanc….
steps.why: Retrieving Pokedex Go Detail Provenance Tests through the concrete human-readable validated Pokemon detail view case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Pokedex product engineering and Go Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Pokedex Go Detail Provenanc…, keep Pokedex Go Detail Provenance Tests connected to executable Go behavior evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Verify request identity, response identity, source URL, cache state, unit conversion, sorting, missing fields, and changed fixtures.
